initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN votes.CreationDate LIKE '2010%' THEN votes.Id END) * 1.0 / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN votes.CreationDate LIKE '2011%' THEN votes.Id END) AS ratio_2010_to_2011
FROM votes
WHERE votes.CreationDate LIKE '2010%' OR votes.CreationDate LIKE '2011%';

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN CreationDate LIKE '2010%' THEN Id END) * 1.0 / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN CreationDate LIKE '2011%' THEN Id END) AS ratio
FROM votes
WHERE CreationDate LIKE '2010%' OR CreationDate LIKE '2011%';

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN CreationDate LIKE '2010%' THEN Id END) * 1.0 /

FROM votes
